text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: Aren't you overdoing it a bit?
Aren't you overdoing it a bit?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? If<n>anything, I'm not
doing enough!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I need to eat and train just like the<n>best runners
do.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: If I do that, my body will be the same<n>as theirs!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(But why the heck does every<n>Umamusume have
a black hole for a<n>stomach?!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(My weight's gone through the roof<n>just trying to
eat as much as them.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Dang it! I'm gonna burn it off<n>through training! I
won't stop till it's<n>all gone!)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin throws herself into<n>strength training
and manages her<n>weight successfully.
